missingScenarioTitles: Display product list with multiple products available
Product list loads within acceptable time threshold
Empty state displayed when no products are available
Product list is scrollable when items exceed viewport height
Product list is displayed correctly on desktop viewport
Product list is displayed correctly on mobile viewport

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Display product list with multiple products available
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Stable UI behavior with verifiable DOM elements and product count assertions in Playwright

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Product list loads within acceptable time threshold
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can measure page load timing and assert against threshold values using performance APIs

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Empty state displayed when no products are available
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Empty state message presence and text can be asserted deterministically in Playwright

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Product list is scrollable when items exceed viewport height
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright supports scroll actions and visibility assertions for elements below the fold

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Product list is displayed correctly on desktop viewport
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can set viewport size and assert layout elements are visible and properly positioned

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Product list is displayed correctly on mobile viewport
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can emulate mobile viewports and devices to verify responsive layout behavior

skippedManualOnlyTests.title: Each product item is visually distinct and readable
skippedManualOnlyTests.reason: Visual distinctiveness and readability require human judgment; automated visual regression tools could supplement but not replace manual inspection for this criterion
